---
title: "🚀 Sprint 0 Kickoff - Three-Agent Collaboration Starts NOW!"
body: |
  ## Welcome Team! 👋
  
  This is our central coordination point for **Sprint 0 (Foundation Week)**.
  
  ---
  
  ## 📋 Sprint 0 Overview
  
  **Duration:** March 24-28, 2026  
  **Goal:** Set up database, backend, and CI/CD foundation  
  **Issues:** 10 issues (57 story points)  
  **Repository:** https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0
  
  ---
  
  ## 🎯 Agent Assignments
  
  ### 🤖 Qwen - Database + Frontend Specialist
  
  **Your Issues:**
  - [ ] Issue #1: PostgreSQL Database Schema (8 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #2: Alembic Migration System (5 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #7: Seed Data for Development (3 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #10: Issue Templates and Labels (2 pts)
  
  **Start Here:** [`docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md`](docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md)
  
  ---
  
  ### 🔌 Aider - Backend + AI Integration Specialist
  
  **Your Issues:**
  - [ ] Issue #3: FastAPI Backend Structure (8 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #4: Google OAuth 2.0 (5 pts)
  
  **Start Here:** [`docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md`](docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md)
  
  ---
  
  ### 🧪 GitHub Copilot - Testing + Deployment Specialist
  
  **Your Issues:**
  - [ ] Issue #5: CI/CD Pipeline (8 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #6: Docker Containerization (5 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #8: Initial Test Suite (8 pts)
  - [ ] Issue #9: Cloud Run Services (5 pts)
  
  **Start Here:** [`docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md`](docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md)
  
  ---
  
  ## 📚 Essential Documentation
  
  Before starting work, review these documents:
  
  1. **[README_IACP3.md](README_IACP3.md)** - Project overview
  2. **[COLLABORATION_GUIDE.md](COLLABORATION_GUIDE.md)** - How we work together
  3. **[docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md](docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md)** - Your issues
  4. **[docs/PHASE1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md](docs/PHASE1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md)** - 5-week plan
  5. **[docs/THREE_AGENT_WORKFLOW.md](docs/THREE_AGENT_WORKFLOW.md)** - Agent roles
  
  ---
  
  ## 📝 Daily Standup Format
  
  Post your daily update as a comment below:
  
  ```markdown
  ## [Your Agent Name] - Day X Standup
  
  ### Yesterday
  - ✅ Completed task 1
  - ✅ Completed task 2
  
  ### Today
  - 🔄 Working on task 3
  - 🔄 Working on task 4
  
  ### Blockers
  - ⛔ [None / Describe blocker and tag relevant agent]
  
  ### PRs for Review
  - [Link to PR if any]
  ```
  
  ---
  
  ## 🎯 Sprint 0 Goals
  
  By end of Week 1, we will have:
  
  - ✅ PostgreSQL schema deployed to staging
  - ✅ Backend services running on Cloud Run
  - ✅ CI/CD pipeline deploying on merge
  - ✅ Test coverage > 75%
  - ✅ Local dev environment working
  
  **Sprint 0 Review:** Friday March 28, 2026
  
  ---
  
  ## 🚀 Getting Started RIGHT NOW
  
  1. **Clone the repo:**
     ```bash
     git clone https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0.git
     cd IACP-3.0
     ```
  
  2. **Read your issues:**
     - Open `docs/SPRINT_0_ISSUES.md`
     - Find issues assigned to you
     - Comment on this discussion when you start
  
  3. **Post your first standup:**
     - Comment below with your plan for today
     - Tag any blockers immediately
  
  4. **Create your first PR:**
     - Branch from issue
     - Work on tasks
     - Request review when ready
  
  ---
  
  ## 📞 Communication
  
  - **Daily Standup:** Comment on this discussion
  - **Issue Questions:** Comment on specific issues
  - **Blockers:** Tag relevant agent in comment
  - **PR Reviews:** GitHub PR review system
  
  ---
  
  ## 🔗 Quick Links
  
  - [Repository](https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0)
  - [Projects Board](https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0/projects)
  - [Issues](https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0/issues)
  - [Actions](https://github.com/rvadera73/IACP-3.0/actions)
  
  ---
  
  **Let's build something amazing together! 🎉**
  
  /cc @Qwen @Aider @GitHub-Copilot
